vibe: Cultural, elegant, organic, editorial. The space feels like a modern cultural museum digital exhibit, focusing on the Douro region. It respects negative space, typography, and warm earthy tones.

scale.overline: text-xs md:text-sm tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-semibold text-[#7C3A00]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Sections should feel like breathing chapters in a book. Minimum vertical padding between sections should be py-24 or py-32.

grid_system.works_section: Bento Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix tall (span 4, row 2) and square (span 4, row 1) bento items.
grid_system.gallery_section: Masonry-style or asymmetrical grid with tight gaps (gap-4).

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-aligned dominant for text heavy areas to maintain editorial readability. Center alignment used sparingly for section dividers or pull quotes.

header.style: Glassmorphism with a cultural twist. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80, border-b border-[#E5DCD0]/50.
header.navigation: Visible desktop links, no hamburger on desktop. Fonts: Work Sans, text-sm, hover:text-[#722F37].

buttons.primary: bg-[#722F37] text-[#FDFBF7] rounded-none px-8 py-3 hover:bg-[#5A252B] transition-colors border border-transparent hover:shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#722F37] border border-[#722F37] rounded-none px-8 py-3 hover:bg-[#722F37] hover:text-[#FDFBF7] transition-colors

cards_works.style: Cardless editorial look. Instead of a box with shadow, use a large image with text placed cleanly underneath or overlapping. Hover: image scales up slightly (scale-105) inside a hidden overflow container.

timeline.style: Vertical line in #7C3A00/30, with timeline nodes as hollow circles. Text to the right. Very minimalist and spaced out.

hero_image.description: Aerial view of Douro Valley vineyards and river
hero_image.usage: Main hero section background or prominent adjacent image. If background, use a black/30 or gradient overlay to ensure text contrast.

texture_azulejo.usage: Use as a subtle background pattern for the 'About Us' or 'Timeline' section. Apply opacity (10-15%) and mix-blend-multiply.

theme_paisagem.description: View of the Douro River flanked by vineyards
theme_paisagem.usage: Cover image for the 'Paisagem' theme category.

theme_historia.description: Detailed blue and white azulejos mural
theme_historia.usage: Cover image for 'Museu do Douro / História' theme category.

theme_gastronomia.usage: Cover image for 'Gastronomia / Vinho' theme category.

interactive_elements.hover_effects: Subtle translate-y-[-2px] for links, scale-105 for images inside overflow-hidden containers.
interactive_elements.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='admin-login-link').
interactive_elements.forms: Inputs should have bg-transparent, border-b border-[#7C3A00]/30, no rounded corners, focus:border-[#722F37]. Shadcn-like structure but customized for editorial feel.

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Build the app as a hybrid_fullstack with an admin login route.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use Playfair Display.
Follow the Organic & Earthy archetype. Use the provided colors exactly.
For the hero section, avoid flat gradient overlays. Use a bento-style split screen or an elegant image overlay with text-shadow for readability.
Implement the 'Works by Theme' as an editorial bento grid, not standard Bootstrap cards.
Include the exact About Us text provided in the prompt: 'Somos a turma do 7.º E, um grupo que começou o seu percurso em conjunto apenas este ano...'
The admin dashboard should use a clean, cardless table for managing posts, utilizing #722F37 as the primary action color.
